messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The unit suite's two slowest files burn seconds on real timers and repeated engine boots, not on testing
What it solves: THE MEASUREMENT. A profiled `vitest run` (3337 tests / 235 files) puts 68% of total test time in 20
files. Two dominate, and both waste it on something other than testing (times are host-scaled from a
~5.5x-slower container):
  - paneTailerClass.test.js — ~1.8s for 21 tests.
  - dependencyGateCli.t…
How it works: The pane-tailer's tests drive its tick instead of waiting for it
